name: Fundamental Stock Dashboard

bestFor: Fundamentals dashboards, investor tools, company analysis pages
agentPrompt: Read README.md, AGENTS.md, CUSTOMIZE.md, and the official API docs at https://www.wisesheets.io/api/docs. Help me customize this Wisesheets dashboard. Keep API keys server-side and use the existing /api/wisesheets proxy.

name: Company Screener
description: A future recipe for screening companies by growth, margin, balance sheet quality, exchange, and industry.
agentPrompt: Read README.md, AGENTS.md, and the official API docs at https://www.wisesheets.io/api/docs. Build or customize a Wisesheets screener. Keep API keys server-side and route API calls through /api/wisesheets.

name: Portfolio Tracker
description: A future recipe for tracking holdings, exposure, company fundamentals, and aggregate portfolio quality.

agentPrompt: Read README.md, AGENTS.md, and the official API docs at https://www.wisesheets.io/api/docs. Customize this portfolio tracker for my holdings. Keep WISESHEETS_API_KEY server-side.

name: Excel Add-in Starter
